# Support AgroLink Tanzania

AgroLink Tanzania is an open-source agricultural marketplace built to connect smallholder farmers across Tanzania directly with buyers — eliminating middlemen and improving food security at the grassroots level.

This project is independently developed and maintained by a first-year ICT student at Mbeya University of Science and Technology, built to production-grade standards with real users in mind.

---

## Why Sponsorship Matters

Running a production platform has real costs:

| Service | Purpose |
|---|---|
| Render (Web Hosting) | Keeps the platform live and accessible 24/7 |
| Supabase (PostgreSQL + Storage) | Database and crop image storage |
| OpenWeatherMap API | Real-time weather data for 20+ Tanzanian cities |
| Gemini Vision AI | AI crop disease diagnosis for farmers |
| Domain (future) | Professional `.co.tz` domain for credibility |

Every active contribution — however small — directly funds the infrastructure serving Tanzanian farmers.

---

## What Your Support Enables

- Keeping the platform free for farmers and buyers
- Expanding AI features (more crops, more regions, SMS alerts)
- Covering API costs as user traffic grows
- Eventually moving to a dedicated server for faster response times across East Africa

---
